name: At Your Svc Town Cars Inc
districts_or_customers: Unknown; appears to be a Palm Beach County area town car/limo operator, not a traditional school-bus contractor
recent_news: No M&A or operating news located. Listed in FL Sunbiz as 'AT YOUR SERVICE TOWN CARS, INC.' but no school-bus or pupil-transport footprint found online.
fit_notes: Poor fit. Name and category point to a small town-car/limo livery, not a school-bus operator. 14 employees and ~$643K revenue are sub-scale even if it does run a few SPED shuttles. Not a meaningful Summit tuck-in.

name: Valley Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: Likely Sayre Area SD and/or other Bradford County PA districts (Athens, Waverly area); not confirmed in public sources
recent_news: No M&A news found. No website or active web footprint located for the Sayre, PA, 150 Desmond St entity. BeST Transit (public) and Chambers Bus Service are the visible operators in the Sayre/Athens area, suggesting Valley Bus Svc is a very small private contractor.
fit_notes: Likely a micro family-run contractor in PA's Northern Tier (~19 employees, ~$638K revenue, ~15-25 buses at most). Plausible bolt-on for a regional PA platform but small scale; would need direct outreach to confirm independence and succession.

name: Dietrich & Sons Inc
principals: Richard J. Dietrich (founder/owner, deceased Dec 2021); Dietrich family successors
districts_or_customers: Historically Valley City Public School District (lost 2024-2025 contract after district moved to in-house transportation following rejection of $850K bid vs prior $615K); also operated Dietrich/Thomas Bus Sales (bus dealer)
recent_news: Jan 2024: Valley City Public Schools rejected Dietrich's $850K bid and voted to bring transportation in-house starting 2024-25, acquiring 7 buses. Dec 2021: founder Richard Dietrich died at age 80 after running the business since the 1960s.
fit_notes: Classic succession story: founder deceased 2021, anchor contract lost in 2024 to in-house district takeover. Independent family operator but likely now distressed/shrinking and ND is outside Summit's core footprint. Could be opportunistic acquisition for fleet/garage assets if Dietrich family wants exit, but limited strategic value as a standalone tuck-in.

name: Bryan School Bus Line Inc
principals: Bryan family (presumed from name; not confirmed)
districts_or_customers: Likely Slippery Rock Area SD and/or Moniteau / Butler County PA districts (Prospect, PA is in Butler County). Not confirmed; W.L. Roenigk, Campbell Bus Lines, and STA Prospect are the main visible operators in the area.
recent_news: No M&A or operating news located. Note: STA (Student Transportation of America, now PE/strategic-owned) has a yard at 128 Kennedy Rd, Prospect PA 16052 — Bryan School Bus Line appears to be a separate small independent at a rural 'Road 1' address.
fit_notes: Small (~17 employees, ~$629K revenue, ~15-20 buses) Butler County family operator in Summit's PA expansion footprint. Plausible tuck-in if independent; but competes in a market already occupied by STA and W.L. Roenigk so likely already on consolidators' radar. Worth a phone call to verify ownership and interest.

name: School Transit Inc
districts_or_customers: Likely Greater Johnstown area / Cambria County PA schools. Greater Johnstown SD's primary contractor is McIlwain School Bus Lines (1551 Ferndale Ave, also 15905), so School Transit Inc may be a sub-contractor, charter/activity provider, or serve a surrounding district.
recent_news: No M&A or operating news located. No website or active web footprint identified for 721 Westinghouse Ave, Johnstown PA 15905.
fit_notes: Sub-scale (~18 employees, ~$626K revenue, ~15-20 buses) Cambria County operator in Summit's PA footprint. Market already includes McIlwain (Johnstown), Tri County, Krise, Mlaker — School Transit Inc is a candidate tuck-in but appears too small to move the needle solo; would need to roll up alongside others. Phone outreach required to confirm independence and ownership.
